seoTitle: Teviotville vs Texas — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Teviotville and Texas. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Teviotville and Texas.
heading: Teviotville vs Texas — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Teviotville, Queensland and Texas, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Teviotville has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Texas (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Teviotville or Texas safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Teviotville has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Texas scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Teviotville scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Texas scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Teviotville or Texas?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Teviotville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
